data.title: Orsted stock plunges to all-time low as Trump halts US wind farm project, causing concern for the Danish company.
data.description: Work on the Revolution Wind project off Rhode Island has been halted following an order, causing concerns for the Danish company involved.

data.title: Mineros S.A. (TSX: MSA) considers debt financing for growth plans in Latin America, with an 88% rise in share price in 2025.
data.description: In Medellin, Colombia, Mineros S.A., a prominent gold producer in Latin America, has disclosed plans to consider a debt financing endeavor to support its expansion strategies. The company's board of directors has directed management to investigate potential options for funding growth initiatives, which include broadening exploration programs and enhancing wholly owned operations. In response to a substantial 88% surge in Mineros' share price throughout 2025, the decision to seek efficient funding alternatives underscores the company's commitment to advancing its operations.

data.title: COFECE approves Pan American Silver's acquisition of MAG Silver shares in Vancouver; all required approvals obtained.
data.description: Pan American Silver Corp. (PAAS) and MAG Silver Corp. (MAG) have received approval from the Mexican Federal Economic Competition Commission (COFECE) for Pan American's acquisition of all MAG Shares. This acquisition includes all issued outstanding common shares of MAG Silver Corp. This announcement follows the approval from all necessary regulatory, shareholder, and court entities. Pan American Silver Corp. is listed on both NYSE (PAAS) and TSX (PAAS), while MAG Silver Corp. is listed on NYSE American (MAG) and TSX (MAG). This marks a significant milestone in the acquisition process between the two companies.

data.title: Novocure's TTFields therapy now covered in Spain for glioblastoma patients. Available through SNS for adults.
data.description: Novocure revealed that Spain’s Ministry of Health has approved Tumor Treating Fields (TTFields) therapy through the Spanish National Health System for treating adult patients with newly diagnosed glioblastoma. This form of primary brain cancer, known for its aggressive nature, has limited treatment choices available, making the approval significant. The therapy's inclusion in the public health system in Spain marks a positive advancement in providing care for patients diagnosed with glioblastoma. Tumor Treating Fields therapy can potentially benefit a considerable number of individuals grappling with this challenging disease.

data.title: BTC late longs wiped out as sub-$112K BTC price prompts calls for lower price levels to follow, as leveraged positions surge.
data.description: In the last day, there has been a notable increase in leveraged positions for Bitcoin, with a significant number of these recent long positions being eliminated as the price of BTC plunged below $112,000.

data.title: Alter Wolff Foley & Stutman LLP attorneys honored in Chambers High Net Worth Guide and The Best Lawyers in America, reaffirming their status as top family and matrimonial law firm from New York, as of Aug. 25, 2025.
data.description: A renowned family and matrimonial law firm based in New York, Alter Wolff Foley & Stutman LLP, has recently been acknowledged in the most recent editions of the Chambers Family/Matrimonial: High Net Worth Guide – New York and The Best Lawyers. The firm continues to receive recognition for its expertise in handling high net worth cases, showcasing its commitment to excellence in the field.

data.title: Grayscale files for SEC approval for Spot Avalanche ETF with AVAX ticker, expanding crypto products lineup.
data.description: The recent filing of the Avalanche ETF is part of Grayscale's efforts to broaden its range of cryptocurrency investment offerings. This move comes after the company filed for XRP and DOGE earlier in the year, showcasing its commitment to expanding its product portfolio in the crypto market. This development highlights Grayscale's focus on diversifying its investment options for investors looking to capitalize on the growing digital asset space.

data.title: ScottsMiracle-Gro's 2025 Report showcases progress in eco initiatives, reaching 157M through green partnerships.
data.description: The organization engaged with more than 157 million individuals through collaborations focused on conserving water resources, safeguarding pollinators, and restoring habitats.

data.title: Driven Brands appoints Mo Khalid as COO, Tim Austin as President of Take 5. Khalid, EVP at Take 5, to become COO of Driven Brands.
data.description: In Charlotte, North Carolina, Driven Brands Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: DRVN) revealed the appointment of Mo Khalid as the Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer. Khalid, currently the Executive Vice President and President of Take 5, will be succeeded by Tim Austin, the Chief Operating Officer of Take 5, who will take over as President of Take 5. The Board of Directors made the announcement, expressing confidence in Khalid's leadership skills and successful experience in the industry.

data.title: IREN doubles GPU fleet to 8.5k with 4.2k NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs. Secures $102m financing for GPUs.
data.description: In New York on August 25, 2025, IREN Limited (NASDAQ: IREN) revealed the acquisition of 4.2k NVIDIA Blackwell B200 GPUs, effectively increasing their total GPU fleet to about 8.5k NVIDIA GPUs. Alongside this expansion, IREN successfully obtained $102 million in financing specifically for a previous transaction involving NVIDIA Blackwell B200 and B300 GPUs.

data.title: Billionaire's heiress loses $80M in crypto after psychic's advice, sued by best friend for massive bets.
data.description: A member of the Thomson Reuters family is taking legal action against her ex-best friend as a result of substantial cryptocurrency investments amounting to millions, which were made based on advice from a psychic.

data.title: Rooter Hero Plumbing & Air urges LA residents to conserve water in summer heat. Company serves CA and AZ locations.
data.description: In Los Angeles, on August 25, 2025, Rooter Hero Plumbing & Air provided guidance on water conservation and quality through simple maintenance and landscaping changes. The company, known for its plumbing and HVAC services in California and Arizona, offered tips to help both residential and commercial properties save water effectively.
